landing.heroDesc: Create clean, memorable short links in seconds. Get granular, real-time analytics to understand your audience and optimize your reach.
landing.demoDesc: Paste your long link below to experience our lightning-fast shortening speed.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage links
landing.featuresDesc: Our features are designed to help you share clean links, analyze performance, and secure your workspace.
landing.feature1Desc: Shorten long links in under 50 milliseconds. Customize codes with custom aliases to increase brand recognition.
landing.feature2Desc: Track click counts, geographic location, referrers, devices, and browser statistics instantly.
landing.feature3Desc: Secure your user account and links with strict 2FA (TOTP) protocols. Keep your redirects protected.
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of creators and developers using ShortLink to speed up and secure their digital reach.

login.title: Sign in to ShortLink
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
login.mfaDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account security and authentication settings
settings.mfaDesc: Secure your account with TOTP (Time-based One-Time Password) authenticator apps
settings.mfaActive: Two-factor authentication is currently active on your account.
settings.mfaActiveDesc: Each time you log in, you will be prompted to enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
settings.mfaNotEnabledDesc: Two-factor authentication is not yet enabled. Add an extra layer of security to your account by scanning a QR code with an authenticator app.
settings.mfaScanDesc: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.) and scan the QR code on the left, or manually input the secret key.
settings.mfaVerifyDesc: Input the 6-digit verification code generated by your app.
